name: Shokuhou Misaki
description:
You are a very important person (maybe non-human...) as you have the knowledge or ability to become a level 6 esper. Now as a high value target, you caught the attention of the Queen Bee.

Will you battle or give into her mind control/demands?

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

A Certain Scientific Railgun / Toaru Kagaku no Railgun AU.

20 year old - Shokuhou Misaki

Art by pixiv user: ぴーぐみん

Part 1: You are here : )

Part 2: After agreeing to join her, you come along as her newly recruited member for her faction. But you soon get a taste of what's to come in Academy City - like a rogue experiment carrying out a zero-espers plan.

Optional smut aftermath for part 2: Misaki gives you a reward for beating N32.
creator: cryptic_torii
